current_objective: Stabilization/handoff-integrity cycle (NOT a 9th discovery), per ADR-022. Discovered that research/opportunity_registry.json -- declared authoritative/binding by rules/research-dedup.md + bootstrap + runtime (Step-0 DEDUP CHECKPOINT) -- was initialized 2026-06-01 and NEVER populated (opportunities: []). Two harms: (1) the mandatory registry.sh search dedup checkpoint returned (none) for every term -> non-functional, risking rediscovery of killed ideas; (2) the mandated handoff registry.sh reindex would have OVERWRITTEN the hand-maintained research/INDEX.md with an empty index. Fixed: backfilled all 9 evaluated opportunities into the registry via the only supported write path (registry.sh add), minting canonical OPP-2026-001..009 in discovery order, linked each to its existing research/TASK-*.md detail file, and let reindex regenerate INDEX.md (5 ARCHIVED / 3 MONITORING / 1 VALIDATING). Recorded a legacy OPP-00N -> OPP-2026-NNN crosswalk in OPPORTUNITIES.md (now the rich narrative, no longer the system of record). Also fixed the stale ADR-008 rubric header in the registry.sh stub template. Verified: registry.sh search now returns hits; list shows 9; JSON valid. No new opportunity scored this cycle -- the memory substrate that future discovery depends on is now sound.
current_phase: PHASE 1 (discovery), on a now-sound memory substrate. Project 01 = VALIDATION HOLD (operator-gated, TASK-0014). The authoritative registry is populated and the dedup checkpoint is functional. Next cycle resumes net-new discovery under the doctrine stack ADR-018 (strip-out-the-AI) -> ADR-015 (both-sides vacuum check) -> ADR-019 (third-stage owned-position filter: durable vacuum + zero-state moat + buildable-without-regulated-capital). Step-0 dedup checkpoint (registry.sh search) and Step-4 registry handoff (registry.sh add|update + reindex) now work as designed.
next_action: Resume net-new discovery under ADR-018 -> ADR-015 -> ADR-019. Run scripts/registry.sh search BEFORE researching (dedup checkpoint is now functional) and scripts/verify_cycle.sh before task closure. Do NOT re-run any of the 9 backfilled sectors (see research/INDEX.md / registry). Target an owned-position play with a zero-state-originable moat in a structurally unserved niche, buildable without a regulated charter.
